mapper.update: UPDATE app_user SET coins = 0, recycle_crystal = 0, welcome_home_bonus_granted = FALSE, starter_gift_standard1_remaining = 0, last_mission_date = NULL, time_pack_cycle_start = NULL, time_pack_bonus_bank = 0, selected_epithet_upper_id = (SELECT id FROM nickname_epithet WHERE kind = 'UPPER' AND phrase = 'ビギナー中の' LIMIT 1), selected_epithet_lower_id = (SELECT id FROM nickname_epithet WHERE kind = 'LOWER' AND phrase = 'ビギナー' LIMIT 1)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_nickname_epithet_owned (user_id, epithet_id) SELECT u.id, e.id FROM app_user u CROSS JOIN nickname_epithet e WHERE (e.kind = 'UPPER' AND e.phrase = 'ビギナー中の') OR (e.kind = 'LOWER' AND e.phrase = 'ビギナー') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
